creator: ru@ucb.crimea.ua
text:
With standard syscons console driver and destructive
	cursor, cursor image sometimes gets mixed with
	character image.

Fix: 

Something related to src/sys/i386/isa/syscons.c and
	blinking cursor.
How-To-Repeat: 
	The following is the uuencoded shell script.
	I tried to make it as simple as it can be.
	Run it on console with syscons driver.
	Please be patient, let it run some time.
	You should see the blank screen with blinking
	cursor in form of ``underlined X''.
